title: Blade - Held Items
description: Gives the held models of tools and weapons 3d models
body:
No Mods Required for 1.21.4 Version!

Pommel Held Item Models mod required for 1.21.1 and below versions

Download Pommel here!

What is Blade?

Blade is a resource pack that has 3d models for several tools and weapons when held, while still having item sprites in the inventory, just like the trident. Pommel is required for versions below 1.21.4.

Tools that have 3d held models include:

  • Pickaxes
  • Swords
  • Shovels
  • Axes
  • Hoes
  • And the Mace!

Also includes an optional download where the sword models' blades are symmetrical with a pointy tip.


Some Examples
